## Problem or motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that is currently not possible or unnecessarily difficult? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature you would like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds or alternative approaches? Why are they insufficient? -->

## Implementation notes (optional)

<!-- If you have thoughts on where in the codebase this would live, which Cloudflare APIs it might use (D1, R2, Workers AI, etc.), or any constraints to be aware of, add them here. -->

## Additional context
